core_mechanism: moderation / statistical-interaction structure — estimating how the strength of the coupling between two variables is itself modulated by a third moderator variable, with that moderated coupling regressed onto (predicted from) a vector of measured features
brief_reason: The method centres on an interaction term — the association between the spatial attention gradient and trait anxiety — whose magnitude is shown to depend on, and be predicted from, structural (grey-matter volume / cortical-thickness) features.
